title: versionreleasedSOP
content:
## versionreleasedstandard process

### released（T-3）
- completedAll feature development and code review
- full rollout
- released

### released（T-1）
- stagingverification
- releasednoticecustomer
- rollback

### released（T）
- 10:00 
- canaryreleased（10%->50%->100%）
- monitoring30

### released（T+1）
- customer
- handledurgentissue
- released
author: Engineering Department
